violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Disposable towel dispenser in back prep area near handsink noted empty.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mop noted in sink not hung to air dry.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and ceilings in prep areas need cleaning. Ceiling inside walkin cooler needs cleaning by fanguards. Three-compartment sink needs recaulk to wall.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Roll-cart needs routine cleaning. Cooking equipment exteriors beneath hood need cleaning.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Hood and filters in front service area need cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Outside enclosed area for trash noted in need of cleaning.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil (scoop) noted being stored with handle laying in chips (front service area).
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning. Food bin exteriors need cleaning. Shelving and roll-carts need cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wire-type metal shelving in ware-washing walkin cooler and roll carts noted not in good repair.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): One ceiling tile noted missing in ware-washing area needs install. Holes in wall behind three-compartment sink noted in need of repair. Some areas of ceiling in kitchen and inside walkin cooler need cleaning. Light covers need cleaning.
